name: Asparagus with Hot Bacon Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Slices of bacon, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a preheated oven on a cookie sheet until it is crisp and browned. Drain well to remove excess fat.
2. In a non-stick skillet, sauté the onion over low heat until it becomes tender. Add the cooked bacon and toss gently.
3. Stir in vinegar, water, and salt. Bring the mixture to a boil, then turn off the heat.
4. Mix in the sugar substitute. Pour the dressing over the hot asparagus and serve.
